generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor for real-time steering angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessingEnabler, CPlusPlusEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle steering angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedSensorDataTransmitted, VehicleSteeringAngleSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model using DBSCAN and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessingEnabler, CPlusPlusEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC model compliant with ISO 15622 Class I for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration and communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI and deep learning capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance CPlusPlusEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storage of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time display, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, SystemPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic executed remotely for computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionLogicInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI for command issuance to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedCommand, SteeringAngleCommand
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation for system diagnostics and performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks from LiDAR processing"
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path visualization for autonomous navigation"
]

instance ACCDecisionLogicInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decision logic (desired speed calculation) displayed for transparency"
]

instance SystemPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports generated for system performance analysis"
]

instance VehicleSpeedCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Desired speed command issued via UI for motor actuation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SteeringAngleCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Steering angle command issued via UI for steering servo actuation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle with NVIDIA Jetson NX and Orin Nano microcomputers"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity potentially cloud-hosted for remote processing"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity on separate machine for UI and command issuance"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for data translation between components"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle system based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC system computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends motor voltage commands and steering commands; remote commands for emergency braking, ACC enable/disable, and desired speed modification."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization, control panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), with ROS2-based intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, compliance validation) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, health monitoring)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 Class I specifications; latency and clock sync requirements (100 ms) ensure safety-critical operation; no explicit V&V beyond compliance with standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync 100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson NX/Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity potentially cloud-hosted for computation offloading; User Entity on separate machine; cross-system components deployed as needed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC system functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with requirements for end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure operational safety; specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in document."
]
